title: Nethpot-EPI
description: A texture pack for netherite pot
body:
# Nethpot-EPI

### If your gonna showcase/distrubute any of my packs anywhere e.g youtube, discord then you must use the modrinth link

A texture pack for netherite potion, also known as netherite op
Upgrade your brewing experience with Nethpot-EPI, a high-resolution texture pack that brings a sleek, powerful look to your potions. Designed for Minecraft Java Edition (32× resolution), this pack reimagines every nethpot item with a refined aesthetic and glowing highlights inspired by netherite’s signature dark-gray and lava-orange palette.

## [Check out my other packs here!](https://modrinth.com/user/JJ_00_EPICS)

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed5b128848d0266cd434455f028ba91e498f41d6_0.webp)
